text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Extra class, done! Let's all head on over to
a cafe and have tea! ♪

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast. Class isn't over yet. It's pop quiz time.
Show me what you learned today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm so ready for this! I'm gonna nail this with a
perfect... score?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Um, Teach? Did we actually learn this
stuff before?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After failing the pop quiz, Mejiro Palmer has to
stay even later...
